title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.255 - Survey inspections, when
text:
324.255.  Survey inspections, when. — In addition to the survey inspection required for licensing or license renewal, the board may make other survey inspections during normal business hours.  Each massage business shall allow the board or its authorized representatives to enter upon its premises during normal business hours for the purpose of conducting any survey inspection.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al.)
